description: Smooth and rich, this spoon-coating mixture of milk, cream, eggs, and spirits is a traditional Nordic drink.  Having been fortified with alcohol, it will keep for some time.
A alcoholic beer local to Morrowind brewed from saltrice.
A liquor local to Morrowind distilled from fermented saltrice.
Wine made from fermented comberries.  It has a slight bitter taste with sour notes.
Comberry wine that has been distilled into a brandy.  Great as an after-dinner drink, but packs a punch.
Wine that has been distilled to a higher proof from the region of Colovia in Cyrodiil.  Great as an after-dinner drink, but packs a punch.
Fine Cyrodiilic liquor distilled from fermented grains.
